creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks, I'll update it once freeze is over, as bumping revision of this port
will cause more than 60 ports to be bumped as well, something which is
discouraged during freeze.

Did you also submit this diff upstream ? Or if you've bug report, or mailing
list post.

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA      | GPG: F682 CDCC 39DC 0FEA E116  20B6 C746 CFA9 E74F A4B0
freebsd.org!ashish | http://people.freebsd.org/~ashish/

Avoid Success At All Costs !!
